assertions.description: navigator.gpu is exposed as the WebGPU entry point.
The WebGPU adapter advertises the clip-distances optional feature.
A GPUDevice can be requested with requiredFeatures: ['clip-distances'].
WGSL using enable clip_distances and @builtin(clip_distances) compiles.
assertions.test: (async()=>{try{const adapter=await navigator.gpu.requestAdapter();if(!adapter||!adapter.features.has('clip-distances'))return false;const device=await adapter.requestDevice({requiredFeatures:['clip-distances']});const module=device.createShaderModule({code:'enable clip_distances; struct VOut { @builtin(position) pos: vec4f, @builtin(clip_distances) clip: array<f32, 1> }; @vertex fn vs(@builtin(vertex_index) i:u32) -> VOut { var p=array<vec2f,3>(vec2f(-1,-1),vec2f(3,-1),vec2f(-1,3)); var o:VOut; o.pos=vec4f(p[i],0,1); o.clip[0]=o.pos.x; return o; } @fragment fn fs() -> @location(0) vec4f { return vec4f(0,1,0,1); }'});const info=await module.getCompilationInfo();device.destroy();return !info.messages.some(m=>m.type==='error');}catch(_){return false;}})()

assertions.description: A render pipeline using a clip_distances vertex output is accepted.
assertions.test: (async()=>{try{const adapter=await navigator.gpu.requestAdapter();if(!adapter||!adapter.features.has('clip-distances'))return false;const device=await adapter.requestDevice({requiredFeatures:['clip-distances']});const module=device.createShaderModule({code:'enable clip_distances; struct VOut { @builtin(position) pos: vec4f, @builtin(clip_distances) clip: array<f32, 1> }; @vertex fn vs(@builtin(vertex_index) i:u32) -> VOut { var p=array<vec2f,3>(vec2f(-1,-1),vec2f(3,-1),vec2f(-1,3)); var o:VOut; o.pos=vec4f(p[i],0,1); o.clip[0]=o.pos.x; return o; } @fragment fn fs() -> @location(0) vec4f { return vec4f(0,1,0,1); }'});const info=await module.getCompilationInfo();if(info.messages.some(m=>m.type==='error')){device.destroy();return false;}device.createRenderPipeline({layout:'auto',vertex:{module,entryPoint:'vs'},fragment:{module,entryPoint:'fs',targets:[{format:'rgba8unorm'}]},primitive:{topology:'triangle-list'}});device.destroy();return true;}catch(_){return false;}})()
